intent: Cross-version replay of rocky9-permissive-plus-constraint against el10 policyvers 35. container_t s0:c0 writing container_file_t s0:c5 with permissive=1. Both decline signals stack: floor=Permissive, authoritative=Constraint. Verifies Constraint bucket is stable across policy versions.

oracle.audit2why_detail: mlsconstrain file { write setattr append unlink link rename } ((h1 dom h2 -Fail-) or (t1 != mcs_constrained_type -Fail-)); Constraint DENIED. Possible cause is the source level (s0:c0) and target level (s0:c5) are different. (audit2why output is byte-identical whether permissive=0 or 1.)

triage_expectation.should_decline_with_reason: Permissive denial AND MCS constraint violation. Both signals decline; no allow should be emitted.
